title: Intersections of Sexual Violence and Anti-Asian Racism among ANHPI College Students
venue: American Public Health Association Annual Meeting
abstract: Presentation of mixed-methods findings from the Double Jeopardy Study examining sexual violence and anti-Asian racism among ANHPI students.

title: Structural Barriers to Prenatal Care in the Context of Maternal Substance Use
venue: Society for Epidemiologic Research Annual Conference
abstract: Qualitative findings exploring how substance use and policy environments shape prenatal care access.

title: Policy Environments and Congenital Syphilis Prevention: Qualitative Findings from California and Louisiana
venue: American Public Health Association Annual Meeting
abstract: Findings on patient-provider relationships and system gaps relevant to congenital syphilis prevention.

title: Examining Masculinities to Inform Gender-Transformative Violence Prevention Programs
abstract: Qualitative study from Rakai, Uganda on masculinities and implications for violence prevention.
